summary: Loaded IMPLEMENTATION-PLAN.md, README.md, numbered intake docs, adrs/, reference/, and 08-source-license-matrix.csv before starting Phase 0 bootstrap.
First raw live turn attempt against codex app-server failed with JSON-RPC -32600: sandbox field was encoded as a map where the stable schema expected a single-key map/string shape.

Retried with stable thread-level read-only sandbox shape. initialize, account/read, model/list, rateLimits/read, thread/start and turn/start all ok; terminal turn/completed observed with status completed. event_count 30, stderr_hash_count 1.
Official Python SDK oracle run raised a JSON serialization error because enum objects returned by the SDK were not directly JSON serializable in the summary writer.

Normalized enum values to their string values before serialization. Rerun of openai-codex oracle (account, models, rate-limit read, thread_start, Thread.run) passed with exact model gpt-5.3-codex-spark confirmed, wall_duration_s 3.713.
Cloned existing PavelLizunov/spark-runner repository (containing only LICENSE) onto build-1 under ~/projects/spark-runner ahead of committing CP1 evidence.

Prepared first PR on branch cp1-evidence-progress to persist MISSION.md, PROGRESS.json, docs/evidence, docs/decisions and CI so CP1 state survives session reset/compaction before CP2 implementation begins.
Started work on branch cp2-minimal-runner to implement the minimal single-crate Rust app-server client per ADR-001..ADR-005, reading current PROGRESS.json and CP1 evidence first.

Implemented single-crate spark-runner (process/jsonl/client/state/config modules, fake_app_server fixture, tests/app_server.rs) plus codex.lock. Local cargo fmt/clippy/test could not be executed in this session (bash tool denied cargo invocations); validation on uap-build-1 remains pending before CP2 is marked green.

Generated stable app-server JSON schema on build-1 via /home/uap/.local/bin/codex app-server generate-json-schema --out protocol/0.142.0 and verified protocol/0.142.0/stable.schema.json sha256 efdc3e4ef848db9543c29d7f150820fe80e970720cc887e17e6f3c196bc37259 matches codex.lock; live doctor was not rerun.

PR #2 opened for commit 7c8a9ea96087042c6365f265f59feb0f9ebc7560; GitHub Actions validate job passed on both the push run (29218755221) and the pull_request run (29218769616). Squash merge remains pending.
Implemented append-only SQLite journal and deterministic restart projection. CP5 focused test and full fmt/clippy/locked test gates passed on build-1; no live model run was performed.

Offline-only cycle 13 gates passed: explicit fake-canary subscription-auth provisioning, bounded redacted approval descriptors, and deterministic cancellation split coverage. No credential value, OAuth/account request, network request, or model turn was performed.
